# Stock Chatter

> Stock Chatter is an AI-first stock signal service that fuses 10
> leading-indicator sources (SEC 8-K filings, FDA catalysts, pre-market
> movers, Reddit chatter, prediction markets and more) into a daily
> watchlist with a clear BUY / HOLD / TRIM / EXIT / SELL recommendation
> plus entry, target and stop on every pick.

Stock Chatter helps non-professional investors catch market-moving
events before they show up in price. It is delivered as a mobile-first
web dashboard plus a single pre-market email digest at 6:30 AM ET on
US trading days.

## Pricing

- AUD $199 / year (≈ AUD $16.58 / month)
- 7-day free trial — no credit card required
- Cancel anytime
- Sold via Lemon Squeezy

## Key features

- Daily AI watchlist with 5-state recommendation engine (BUY, HOLD,
  TRIM, EXIT, SELL)
- Entry, target and stop price on every pick
- Pre-market email digest at 6:30 AM ET, weekdays
- 10 leading-indicator signal sources fused by an AI scoring engine
- Mobile-first dashboard (Robinhood-style polish)
- Paper-trading and personal watchlist
- Per-user market-cap range and other AI engine settings

## Signal sources

Stock Chatter blends ten data streams:

1. SEC 8-K filings (material corporate events)
2. FDA biotech catalyst calendar (PDUFA dates, AdComm meetings)
3. Pre-market movers (Yahoo Finance)
4. Reddit retail chatter (ApeWisdom)
5. Prediction markets (Kalshi, Polymarket where applicable)
6. Insider buying (Form 4 filings)
7. Analyst rating changes
8. Earnings surprises
9. Sector pulse (relative strength)
10. News + sentiment

## What Stock Chatter is NOT

- Not financial advice. You can lose money.
- Not a brokerage — Stock Chatter does not place trades.
- Not a high-frequency trading tool. The signal frequency is daily.
- Not a black box — every pick shows the source signal that triggered it.

## About

Stock Chatter is part of the GetFamilyFinance family of products —
small, sharp finance tools built for non-professional investors who
want institutional-grade data without the noise.
